sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89197" key="prosepikatastre/fw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-καταστρέφω</orth>, <sense id="n89197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overthrow besides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν δόξαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:87:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
